x-enumeration-literals.name: ROA Assessment
x-enumeration-literals.description: Return on Assets (ROA) Assessment measures how efficiently a bank uses its total assets to generate profit.

x-enumeration-literals.name: ROE Assessment
x-enumeration-literals.description: Return on Equity (ROE) Assessment: measures profit generated from shareholders funds.

x-enumeration-literals.name: NIM Assessment
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Net Interest Margin (NIM) Assessment: measures the difference between interest income earned and interest paid.

Includes:
Operating profit margin
Cost-to-Income Ratio
Efficiency ratio

x-enumeration-literals.name: Operating Profitability Assessment
x-enumeration-literals.description: Evaluates profit from core banking operations.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Non-Interest Income Profitability Assessment
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Measures income from fees and services.

Includes:
Fee-based income (cards, advisory, commissions)
Trading income
Service charges

x-enumeration-literals.name: Segment Profitability Assessment
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Evaluates profitability by business unit.

Includes:
Retail banking profitability
Corporate banking profitability
Investment banking profitability
Branch-level profit analysis

x-enumeration-literals.name: Risk-Adjusted Profitability Assessment
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Measures profit after considering risk exposure.

Includes:
Risk-Adjusted Return on Capital (RAROC)
Economic Value Added (EVA)
Expected loss adjustments
